message:
feat(inheritance): implement joined-table parent field embedding

Add #[sqlmodel(parent)] attribute for joined-table inheritance child
models that embeds the parent model as a field:

- New FieldDef::parent flag excludes the field from INSERT/UPDATE/SELECT
  column lists (it is hydrated from a joined query, not stored directly)
- validate_joined_inheritance_parent_field() enforces exactly one
  #[sqlmodel(parent)] field on joined-table inheritance children
- from_row() now hydrates parent fields by calling the parent type's
  from_row() with table-prefixed column names, supporting both plain
  and aliased/eager-loaded row layouts
- Renamed internal row binding to local_row for clarity with
  parent hydration scope

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
